Description.SourceString:
Popular among Wild Knight scouts, this mixture focussed the senses and improved reaction times. It was taken by hunters as they explored the dangerous forests of Ashenfall, allowing them respond to threats faster than before. Those extra moments saved countless lives.

In the village of Bramblemead there was a contingent of foolish youngsters who began drinking this mixture in large quantities, due to the energetic thrill it created. It would allow them to engage in strenuous activities for far longer without getting tired.

Its popularly began to grow among older members of the population as well, though no one would be willing to explain why.
